subject: [PATCH] mm/migrate_device: document folio_get requirement before frozen PMD split

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Questioned the reliability of folio_get() in this context, suggesting that other pfn walkers can temporarily grab a reference without issues.

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Recommended removing the VM_WARN_ON_ONCE() warning, as folio_split_unmapped() will handle the case gracefully.

2026-03-09.patch_summary: The patch aims to document the requirement for folio_get() before frozen PMD split in mm/migrate_device.
